<!-- Copyright © 2023-2026 ValidMind Inc. All rights reserved.
Refer to the LICENSE file in the root of this repository for details.
SPDX-License-Identifier: AGPL-3.0 AND ValidMind Commercial -->

To create a document template from scratch:

a. Click **{{< fa plus >}} Create {Type} Template**, where `{Type}` is the type of template you want to create.

b. Enter the **Template Name** and a **Template Description**.

c. Click **Create Template** to create the new template.
